summary: Standard procedure for cold startup of AFBC boiler from ambient to full load
key_steps: 1. Pre-start checks (air/fuel/water) 2. Purge furnace 3. Light oil burner ignition 4. Bed heating to 650°C 5. Coal feeding initiation 6. Load ramp to MCR
safety_precautions: Ensure all personnel clear of furnace area. Verify explosion vent integrity. Monitor CO levels continuously during purge.
tools_required: Flame scanner | Combustion analyzer | IR pyrometer

summary: Sequence and timing for soot blowing to maintain heat transfer surfaces
key_steps: 1. Verify steam pressure >8 bar 2. Open drain valves 3. Activate retractable blowers top-to-bottom 4. Monitor flue gas temp differential 5. Log cleaning effectiveness
safety_precautions: Never operate with personnel on boiler platform. Check lance condition before operation.
tools_required: Steam pressure gauge | Vibration monitor

summary: Immediate response procedure when tube leak is confirmed or suspected
key_steps: 1. Trip fuel feed immediately 2. Maintain ID fan for cooling 3. Isolate affected section 4. Controlled cooldown 5. Drain and inspect 6. Notify service team
safety_precautions: Full PPE mandatory. Hot work permit required for any repair. Confirm zero pressure before entry.
tools_required: IR camera | UT thickness gauge | PPE kit

summary: Routine checks for safe and efficient thermic fluid heater operation
key_steps: 1. Check fluid level in expansion tank 2. Verify circulation pump pressure 3. Record inlet/outlet temperatures 4. Check stack temperature 5. Inspect for leaks 6. Record fuel consumption
safety_precautions: Monitor for fluid vapour near heater. Ensure fire extinguisher accessible.
tools_required: Digital thermometer | Pressure gauge | Leak detector

summary: Periodic testing of thermic fluid properties to prevent degradation
key_steps: 1. Sample collection from live circuit 2. Flash point test 3. Viscosity measurement 4. Carbon residue analysis 5. Compare with OEM limits 6. Plan partial/full replacement
safety_precautions: Handle hot fluid with protective gloves. Sample from designated port only.
tools_required: Flash point tester | Viscometer | Sample bottles

summary: Optimization of combustion parameters for maximum efficiency
key_steps: 1. Measure O2 and CO in flue gas 2. Adjust air damper for target O2 (3-4%) 3. Verify flame stability 4. Record stack temperature 5. Calculate efficiency 6. Document settings
safety_precautions: No combustion adjustment during startup phase. Ensure stable load before tuning.
tools_required: Flue gas analyzer | Anemometer | Combustion calculator

summary: Procedure for WHRB startup synchronized with upstream process
key_steps: 1. Verify upstream process gas availability 2. Pre-start safety checks 3. Open gas dampers gradually 4. Monitor drum level and pressure 5. Steam admission to header 6. Load stabilization
safety_precautions: Confirm gas composition before admission. Emergency bypass must be functional.
tools_required: Gas analyzer | Drum level indicator | Safety interlocks check

summary: Operating procedure for limestone slurry preparation and recirculation
key_steps: 1. Prepare limestone slurry to 25% concentration 2. Start recirculation pumps 3. Monitor pH in absorber (5.5-6.0) 4. Adjust limestone feed rate 5. Monitor SO2 at stack 6. Manage gypsum discharge
safety_precautions: Slurry is abrasive — wear protective equipment near pumps. Monitor pump vibration.
tools_required: pH meter | Slurry density meter | Flow meter

summary: Cleaning and inspection of mist eliminator blades and wash system
key_steps: 1. Initiate wash cycle 2. Inspect nozzle spray patterns 3. Check blade condition for scaling/deformation 4. Clear blocked nozzles 5. Verify pressure drop across ME 6. Record findings
safety_precautions: Confined space entry procedures apply. Ensure wash water isolation before blade inspection.
tools_required: Pressure differential gauge | Inspection mirror | Nozzle cleaning tools

summary: Procedure for checking and restoring vacuum in absorption chiller
key_steps: 1. Record current vacuum level 2. Helium leak test on shells 3. Check purge unit operation 4. Inspect sight glasses for non-condensables 5. Run evacuation pump 6. Verify design vacuum restored
safety_precautions: Lithium bromide solution is corrosive — full PPE. Never open system to atmosphere.
tools_required: Vacuum gauge | Helium leak detector | Evacuation pump

sop_title: Confined Space Entry for Equipment Inspection
summary: Safety procedure for entering boiler drums furnaces and vessels
key_steps: 1. Obtain confined space permit 2. Atmosphere testing (O2/LEL/toxics) 3. Rescue plan in place 4. Continuous ventilation 5. Buddy system mandatory 6. Communication check every 15 min
safety_precautions: Minimum 19.5% O2 before entry. Rescue team on standby. Emergency extraction harness worn.
tools_required: 4-gas detector | Ventilation blower | Communication radio | Rescue tripod

summary: Structured approach to root cause analysis for recurring equipment issues
key_steps: 1. Define problem clearly 2. Ask Why (Level 1) 3. Ask Why (Level 2) 4. Ask Why (Level 3) 5. Ask Why (Level 4) 6. Ask Why (Level 5 — true root cause) 7. Define corrective action 8. Verify effectiveness
safety_precautions: Involve cross-functional team. Document all levels. Distinguish symptoms from causes.
tools_required: Fishbone diagram template | 5-Why worksheet | CAPA form

summary: Procedure for bed material inventory control and quality maintenance
key_steps: 1. Monitor bed height via pressure drop 2. Check bed material size distribution (0.5-1.5mm) 3. Drain bed material at regular intervals 4. Add fresh material to maintain inventory 5. Sample and test forite calcium content 6. Log bed drain quantity
safety_precautions: Wear heat-resistant gloves near bed drain points. Ensure drain hopper cooling water is functional.
tools_required: Sieve shaker | Bed level gauge | Sample containers | Weighing scale

summary: Controlled shutdown procedure for planned maintenance or load reduction
key_steps: 1. Reduce load gradually at 5%/min 2. Stop coal feeders 3. Continue oil firing for bed cooling 4. Cool bed below 400°C 5. Stop oil burners 6. Maintain ID fan for cooling 7. Controlled depressurization 8. Close all dampers after 8 hours
safety_precautions: Do not attempt rapid cooldown. Monitor for unburnt fuel during transition. Confirm safe temperatures before isolation.
tools_required: Temperature loggers | Combustion analyzer | Pressure recorder

summary: Acid cleaning procedure for removal of waterside deposits in boiler tubes
key_steps: 1. Isolate boiler and drain 2. Fill with 5% HCl + inhibitor solution 3. Circulate at 60°C for 6 hours 4. Drain and neutralize with Na2CO3 5. Rinse with DM water 6. Passivation with sodium nitrite 7. Inspect surfaces 8. Document cleaning record
safety_precautions: Use acid-resistant PPE. Ensure ventilation for HCl fumes. Neutralization pond must be ready before drain.
tools_required: Chemical dosing pump | pH meter | Temperature probe | Corrosion coupons

summary: Inspection and cleaning of tubular air preheater for heat transfer restoration
key_steps: 1. Isolate APH — block gas and air side 2. Soot blow remaining deposits 3. Water wash from air side 4. Inspect tubes for erosion and fouling 5. Measure tube wall thickness 6. Replace damaged tubes 7. Dry thoroughly before restart
safety_precautions: Ensure no live gas flow during inspection. Hot ash may be present — full PPE. Lock out/tag out air and gas dampers.
tools_required: UT thickness gauge | Inspection camera | Water wash pump | Tube expander

summary: Procedure for inspecting and repairing furnace refractory lining
key_steps: 1. Cool furnace below 50°C 2. Visual inspection for cracks and spalling 3. Tap test for hollow spots 4. Mark damaged areas 5. Remove loose refractory 6. Apply gunning mix per OEM spec 7. Cure with controlled heat-up 8. Document repair areas
safety_precautions: Confined space entry required. Wear dust mask for refractory dust. Follow controlled heat-up curve strictly.
tools_required: Refractory gun | Mixing equipment | IR pyrometer | Tap hammer | Inspection light

summary: Inspection of cyclone separators for erosion and refractory condition
key_steps: 1. Cool and isolate cyclone 2. Inspect vortex finder for erosion 3. Check barrel refractory condition 4. Measure refractory thickness 5. Inspect dipleg seal 6. Check expansion joints 7. Document findings with photos
safety_precautions: Confined space entry — full PPE. Scaffolding safety procedures apply. Hot dust hazard.
tools_required: Refractory thickness gauge | Inspection camera | Scaffolding | Endoscope

summary: Cold startup procedure for CFBC boiler including cyclone preheat
key_steps: 1. Pre-start safety checks 2. Start bed preheating with oil burners 3. Preheat cyclone refractory gradually 4. Achieve bed temp 600°C 5. Initiate coal feed 6. Ramp load per OEM curve 7. Monitor cyclone differential pressure 8. Stabilize at MCR
safety_precautions: Follow OEM heat-up curve strictly — max 50°C/hr for refractory. Monitor CO during purge.
tools_required: Combustion analyzer | IR pyrometer | Pressure recorder | DCS trending

summary: Procedure for controlled WHRB shutdown when upstream process stops
key_steps: 1. Coordinate with upstream process shutdown timing 2. Close gas inlet dampers gradually 3. Monitor drum level and pressure 4. Open bypass damper 5. Natural cooling for 12 hours 6. Close all isolation valves 7. Drain if extended outage
safety_precautions: Do not close gas dampers rapidly — thermal shock risk. Maintain drum level until pressure drops below 2 bar.
tools_required: Drum level gauge | Pressure recorder | Temperature loggers

summary: Systematic UT thickness measurement of all heat transfer surfaces
key_steps: 1. Prepare inspection grid map 2. Mark measurement points at 300mm intervals 3. Calibrate UT gauge 4. Measure and record all points 5. Compare with baseline data 6. Identify areas below minimum 7. Plan tube replacement 8. Generate contour map
safety_precautions: Scaffolding safety mandatory. Ensure boiler is at ambient temperature. Coordinate with NDT certified personnel.
tools_required: UT thickness gauge | Grid marking tools | Scaffolding | Data logger | Reference block

summary: Emergency shutdown procedure for thermic fluid heater abnormal conditions
key_steps: 1. Hit emergency stop button 2. Keep circulation pump running for 30 minutes 3. Open TF expansion tank vent 4. Do NOT isolate circulation until fluid temp below 100°C 5. Investigate root cause 6. Notify service team
safety_precautions: Never stop circulation pump immediately — thermal decomposition risk. Monitor expansion tank for overflow.
tools_required: Temperature probes | Fire extinguisher | Communication radio

summary: Comprehensive annual maintenance procedure for thermic fluid heater
key_steps: 1. Complete shutdown and cooldown 2. Drain TF fluid for lab analysis 3. Open coil inspection ports 4. Inspect coil for deposits 5. Check expansion tank and piping 6. Inspect burner assembly 7. Hydro test coil at 1.5x design 8. Refill with tested fluid
safety_precautions: Lock out/tag out all energy sources. TF fluid is combustible — no hot work near drain points.
tools_required: Hydro test pump | Inspection camera | Sample bottles | Torque wrench set

summary: Startup procedure for FGD system after planned maintenance shutdown
key_steps: 1. Verify all maintenance work complete 2. Fill absorber sump with water 3. Start recirculation pumps one by one 4. Prepare limestone slurry 5. Initiate slurry feed 6. Commission pH control loop 7. Verify SO2 removal efficiency 8. Align CEMS
safety_precautions: Check all pump mechanical seals before start. Verify ME wash system operational before gas admission.
tools_required: pH meter | Flow meter | CEMS calibration gas | Pump alignment tools

summary: Operating procedure for gypsum hydrocyclone and vacuum belt filter
key_steps: 1. Start hydrocyclone feed pump 2. Adjust underflow concentration to 50% 3. Start vacuum belt filter 4. Monitor gypsum cake moisture (target <10%) 5. Manage filtrate return 6. Sample gypsum for quality 7. Manage stockpile
safety_precautions: Rotating equipment hazard — no loose clothing near belt filter. Slurry is abrasive.
tools_required: Moisture analyzer | Slurry density meter | Vacuum gauge | Sample bags

summary: Emergency procedure to bypass FGD when critical failure occurs
key_steps: 1. Activate emergency bypass damper 2. Notify environmental officer 3. Record bypass start time 4. Reduce boiler load to minimize emissions 5. Investigate FGD failure 6. Restore FGD as soon as possible 7. Report bypass duration to CPCB
safety_precautions: Bypass increases SO2 emissions — minimize duration. Coordinate with environmental compliance team.
tools_required: Damper controls | CEMS | Communication radio | Event logger

summary: Maintenance procedure for ESP rapping mechanism — collecting and discharge electrodes
key_steps: 1. De-energize ESP fields 2. Verify zero voltage at electrodes 3. Inspect rapping hammers and shafts 4. Check rapping motor and gearbox 5. Verify rapping sequence and timing 6. Inspect collecting plates for alignment 7. Clean hoppers 8. Re-energize and verify
safety_precautions: ESP operates at very high voltage — confirm all fields de-energized and grounded before entry. Full electrical PPE.
tools_required: Voltage tester | Alignment tools | Torque wrench | Timing light | Megger

summary: Inspection and maintenance of ESP T-R sets and AVC controllers
key_steps: 1. Isolate T-R set from bus 2. Discharge capacitors 3. Check oil level and condition 4. Megger test windings 5. Inspect rectifier diodes 6. Check AVC card parameters 7. Run spark test 8. Verify V-I curve
safety_precautions: High voltage equipment — only qualified electrical personnel. Verify ground stick applied before access.
tools_required: Megger | Oil test kit | AVC programmer | V-I curve plotter

summary: Periodic inspection of CT fan assembly including blades and gear reducer
key_steps: 1. Lock out fan motor 2. Inspect blade condition for cracks and erosion 3. Check blade pitch angle 4. Inspect fan hub and bolts 5. Check gear reducer oil level and quality 6. Inspect motor and coupling 7. Verify vibration levels after restart
safety_precautions: Work at height procedures — fall protection mandatory. Verify fan is locked out and tagged. Never stand under fan during inspection.
tools_required: Pitch angle gauge | Vibration analyzer | Oil sampling kit | Torque wrench | Fall harness

summary: Procedure for managing cooling water chemistry to control scaling and corrosion
key_steps: 1. Test CW for pH/TDS/hardness/chlorides 2. Dose corrosion inhibitor per OEM guideline 3. Manage cycles of concentration (3-5 COC) 4. Adjust blowdown rate 5. Dose biocide weekly 6. Monitor Langelier Index 7. Record all parameters
safety_precautions: Handle chemicals with gloves and goggles. Biocide is toxic — follow MSDS. Store chemicals in designated area.
tools_required: Water test kit | Dosing pumps | TDS meter | pH meter | Chemical storage area

summary: Regeneration procedure for cation and anion exchange beds
key_steps: 1. Take bed offline 2. Backwash for 15 minutes 3. Inject acid (HCl 5%) for cation bed 4. Slow rinse 30 minutes 5. Fast rinse until conductivity <20 µS 6. For anion — inject NaOH 4% 7. Rinse to specification 8. Put bed online
safety_precautions: Acid and caustic are corrosive — full PPE. Ensure neutralization pit operational. Never mix acid and caustic.
tools_required: Conductivity meter | pH meter | Flow meter | Chemical dosing pump | PPE kit

sop_title: DM Plant Mixed Bed Polisher Operation
summary: Operating and regeneration procedure for mixed bed polishing unit
key_steps: 1. Monitor outlet conductivity (<0.1 µS target) 2. Monitor silica (<20 ppb) 3. When breakthrough occurs — take offline 4. Backwash to separate resins 5. Regenerate cation and anion separately 6. Remix resins with air 7. Rinse and put online
safety_precautions: Separate resins carefully during backwash — improper separation leads to poor quality. Chemical handling PPE.
tools_required: Conductivity meter | Silica analyzer | Air blower | Sight glass | Chemical dosing system

summary: Startup procedure for pulse jet bag filter system
key_steps: 1. Inspect all bags and cages 2. Verify compressed air supply at 6 bar 3. Check pulse valve operation 4. Close bypass damper 5. Start ID fan with damper control 6. Admit gas gradually 7. Monitor differential pressure (target 100-150 mmWC) 8. Set pulse cleaning timer
safety_precautions: Ensure gas temperature above dew point before admission — moisture ruins bags. Check for CO if combustible dust.
tools_required: DP gauge | Compressed air gauge | Opacity monitor | Temperature probe

summary: Procedure for replacing filter bags in pulse jet bag filter
key_steps: 1. Isolate compartment — close inlet and outlet dampers 2. Allow cooling to ambient 3. Remove cage and bag from top 4. Inspect thimble plate for wear 5. Install new bag with proper seal 6. Insert cage carefully 7. Perform leak test with DOP 8. Return compartment to service
safety_precautions: Work at height — fall protection mandatory. Dust exposure — wear respiratory protection. Lock out/tag out compartment.
tools_required: Fall harness | Respiratory mask | DOP test kit | Bag installation tools

summary: Startup procedure for multiple-effect evaporator system
key_steps: 1. Pre-start checks on all effects 2. Start CW to condenser 3. Establish vacuum in last effect 4. Start steam to 1st effect 5. Feed liquor admission 6. Monitor level in each effect 7. Adjust steam and feed rates 8. Achieve steady-state concentration
safety_precautions: Monitor for tube priming — maintain minimum level in each effect. Check vacuum continuously.
tools_required: Vacuum gauge | Level indicators | Refractometer | Temperature probes | Steam pressure gauge

summary: Chemical cleaning procedure for removal of scale deposits in evaporator tubes
key_steps: 1. Isolate and drain evaporator 2. Fill with 3% HCl solution 3. Circulate at 65°C for 4 hours 4. Monitor acid concentration — replenish if needed 5. Drain and neutralize with soda ash 6. DM water rinse 7. Inspect tube surfaces 8. Passivation treatment
safety_precautions: Acid fumes — ensure forced ventilation. PPE mandatory. Neutralize all effluent before discharge.
tools_required: Chemical dosing pump | pH meter | Temperature probe | Inspection camera | Effluent neutralization system

summary: Energy isolation procedure for equipment maintenance safety
key_steps: 1. Identify all energy sources 2. Notify affected personnel 3. Shut down equipment 4. Apply lockout devices to each energy isolation point 5. Tag each lock with name/date/reason 6. Verify zero energy state 7. Perform work 8. Remove locks in reverse order
safety_precautions: Each worker applies their own lock. Never remove another person's lock. Verify zero energy before work.
tools_required: Lockout padlocks | Lockout hasps | Tags | Voltage tester | Pressure gauge

summary: Procedure for safe erection and use of scaffolding for equipment maintenance
key_steps: 1. Scaffold design and load calculation 2. Foundation preparation 3. Erection by certified personnel 4. Guardrails and toe boards 5. Scaffold tag — Green (safe) 6. Daily inspection before use 7. Modification only by scaffold crew 8. Dismantling procedure
safety_precautions: Never overload scaffold. Inspect after adverse weather. Do not use damaged scaffold. Fall protection mandatory.
tools_required: Spirit level | Scaffold components | Inspection checklist | Green/Red tags | Fall harness

summary: Procedure for ultrasonic thickness measurement on boiler and vessel tubes
key_steps: 1. Prepare surface — remove scale and paint 2. Calibrate UT gauge with reference block 3. Apply couplant gel 4. Take readings at marked grid points 5. Record readings in tube map 6. Compare with previous survey 7. Flag readings below minimum wall 8. Report and recommendations
safety_precautions: Access may require confined space entry or work at height — follow respective SOPs. Handle couplant carefully.
tools_required: UT flaw detector | Reference calibration block | Couplant gel | Marking paint | Grid template

summary: Procedure for weld repair on boiler tubes and pressure parts per ASME/IBR
key_steps: 1. Obtain welding procedure specification (WPS) 2. Verify welder qualification 3. Prepare weld joint — grinding and cleaning 4. Preheat if required (per material spec) 5. Weld using approved procedure 6. Post-weld heat treatment if required 7. NDT inspection (RT/UT) 8. Hydro test
safety_precautions: Hot work permit mandatory. Fire watch during and 30 min after welding. Only certified welders on pressure parts.
tools_required: Welding machine | Grinding tools | Preheat torch | NDT equipment | Hydro test pump

summary: Procedure for vibration monitoring and analysis of rotating machinery
key_steps: 1. Mount accelerometer on bearing housing 2. Record vibration in 3 axes 3. Capture time waveform and FFT spectrum 4. Identify dominant frequencies — 1x/2x/BPFO/BPFI 5. Compare with ISO 10816 limits 6. Trend against baseline 7. Diagnose fault type 8. Recommend corrective action
safety_precautions: Ensure machine guard in place during measurement. Do not touch rotating parts. Use magnetic mounting only on flat surfaces.
tools_required: Vibration analyzer | Accelerometer | Data collector | Laser tachometer | Analysis software

summary: Emergency procedure to decrystallize lithium bromide solution in absorption chiller
key_steps: 1. Confirm crystallization by sight glass inspection 2. Apply hot water to generator at 95°C 3. Manually crack open solution valves 4. Gently circulate to dissolve crystals 5. Monitor solution temperature rise 6. Gradually restore normal operation 7. Check solution concentration 8. Investigate root cause
safety_precautions: LiBr is corrosive — do not open system. Do not apply direct flame for heating. Monitor for pressure buildup.
tools_required: Hot water supply | Temperature probes | Sight glass inspection lamp | Solution hydrometer

summary: Procedure for annual performance testing of absorption chiller
key_steps: 1. Ensure stable operating conditions for 2 hours 2. Measure chilled water inlet/outlet temperature 3. Measure cooling water inlet/outlet temperature 4. Measure hot water/steam inlet conditions 5. Calculate cooling capacity and COP 6. Compare with design values 7. Identify degradation areas 8. Report findings
safety_precautions: All temperature sensors must be calibrated before test. Do not adjust controls during test period.
tools_required: Calibrated thermometers | Flow meters | Data logger | Performance calculation sheet

summary: Procedure for replacing deteriorated cooling tower fill media
key_steps: 1. Shutdown CT cell and isolate 2. Drain basin 3. Remove drift eliminators 4. Remove old fill media 5. Inspect support structure 6. Install new fill media per layout drawing 7. Reinstall drift eliminators 8. Refill basin and test
safety_precautions: Work at height — full fall protection. Biological hazard from Legionella — respiratory protection mandatory. Decontaminate before entry.
tools_required: Fall harness | Respiratory protection | Lifting equipment | Fill media supports | Layout drawings

summary: Systematic ultrasonic thickness measurement of boiler water wall and superheater tubes
key_steps: 1. Map all measurement points on tube layout 2. Surface preparation — remove scale 3. Calibrate UT gauge 4. Measure at each grid point 5. Record in tube map database 6. Compare with last survey 7. Flag tubes below minimum 8. Generate contour report
safety_precautions: Scaffolding and confined space procedures apply. Ensure boiler at ambient temperature before entry.
tools_required: UT flaw detector | Calibration block | Couplant gel | Grid template | Scaffold

summary: Hydrostatic pressure test procedure per IBR regulations after repair or overhaul
key_steps: 1. Ensure all repairs complete and NDT cleared 2. Fill boiler with treated water 3. Vent all air pockets 4. Pressurize gradually to 1.5x design pressure 5. Hold for 30 minutes 6. Inspect all joints and welds for leaks 7. Record results 8. Obtain IBR inspector clearance
safety_precautions: Never stand near high-pressure connections during test. Ensure all safety valves gagged or isolated. Only authorized personnel in test area.
tools_required: Hydro test pump | Pressure recorder | Calibrated test gauge | Inspection mirror

summary: Procedure for measuring ESP collection efficiency and optimizing performance
key_steps: 1. Ensure stable boiler load for 2 hours 2. Isokinetic sampling at inlet and outlet 3. Calculate collection efficiency 4. Record V-I characteristics all fields 5. Optimize rapping sequence 6. Adjust AVC parameters 7. Retest after optimization 8. Document results
safety_precautions: Duct access at height — fall protection. Hot gas hazard — heat-resistant gloves. Sampling probe handling care.
tools_required: Isokinetic sampler | Pitot tube | Gas analyzer | AVC programmer | Data logger

summary: Comprehensive annual overhaul procedure for pulse jet bag filter
key_steps: 1. Isolate and cool bag house 2. Inspect all bags and cages 3. Replace damaged bags 4. Clean and inspect pulse valves 5. Check compressed air system 6. Inspect structural integrity 7. Test all instrumentation 8. Leak test with DOP before restart
safety_precautions: Confined space and work at height procedures. Respiratory protection for dust exposure. Lock out/tag out all energy.
tools_required: Fall harness | DOP test kit | Respiratory mask | Torque wrench | Inspection checklist

summary: Shutdown and preservation procedure for extended evaporator outage
key_steps: 1. Reduce feed rate gradually 2. Stop steam/heat supply 3. Break vacuum slowly 4. Drain all effects 5. Flush with clean water 6. Dry all surfaces 7. Apply preservation chemicals 8. Close all openings with blanks
safety_precautions: Monitor vacuum release — do not open rapidly. Ensure all hazardous fluids drained. Chemical handling PPE.
tools_required: Vacuum gauge | Preservation chemicals | Blank flanges | Drain pump | Drying equipment

summary: Annual maintenance procedure for DM plant including resin assessment
key_steps: 1. Take plant offline 2. Drain and inspect vessels 3. Check internal distributors and laterals 4. Resin sampling and capacity test 5. Replace degraded resin if needed 6. Inspect rubber lining 7. Check valves and piping 8. Recommission and test water quality
safety_precautions: Chemical handling — acid and caustic PPE. Confined space entry for vessel inspection. Resin disposal per environmental norms.
tools_required: Resin test kit | Inspection camera | Torque wrench | Water quality analyzers | Chemical PPE

sop_title: Crane and Lifting Operations for Equipment Maintenance
summary: Safety procedure for crane operations during equipment maintenance and overhaul
key_steps: 1. Prepare lift plan — weight and COG calculation 2. Verify crane capacity vs load 3. Inspect slings and shackles 4. Barricade lift zone 5. Assign signal person 6. Trial lift to 150mm 7. Execute lift per plan 8. Secure load at destination
safety_precautions: Never exceed crane rated capacity. Wind speed limit 30 km/h. All personnel clear of swing radius. Use tag lines.
tools_required: Crane | Calibrated load cell | Slings | Shackles | Communication radio | Tag lines

summary: Procedure for issuing and managing hot work permits in plant areas
key_steps: 1. Identify hot work location and hazards 2. Gas test area — LEL and O2 3. Remove or cover combustibles within 15m 4. Arrange fire watch with extinguisher 5. Issue permit with time validity 6. Monitor during work 7. Fire watch 30 min after completion 8. Close permit
safety_precautions: Mandatory gas testing. Fire watch must have clear escape route. Never hot work near open drains or vessels.
tools_required: 4-gas detector | Fire extinguisher | Fire blankets | Hot work permit forms | Barrier tape

sop_title: Electrical Safety — Work on HT/LT Switchgear
summary: Safety procedure for work on high tension and low tension switchgear
key_steps: 1. Obtain electrical work permit 2. Isolate at source — open breaker 3. Test for dead — use HT proving unit 4. Apply earth connections 5. Apply locks and tags 6. Erect safety barriers 7. Perform work 8. Remove earths and restore in sequence
safety_precautions: Only certified electricians. Arc flash PPE per IEEE 1584. Verify dead at point of work. Never work alone on HT.
tools_required: HT proving unit | Earth clamp set | Arc flash PPE | Lockout devices | Megger | Phase rotation meter

summary: Chemical cleaning procedure for WHRB waterside deposits removal
key_steps: 1. Isolate and drain boiler 2. Fill with 3% citric acid + inhibitor 3. Heat to 80°C and circulate for 8 hours 4. Drain and rinse 5. Neutralize with ammonia solution 6. Passivation with hydrazine 7. Inspect tube surfaces 8. Document and dispose effluent
safety_precautions: Acid fumes — forced ventilation and respiratory protection. Effluent disposal per CPCB norms. No hot work during cleaning.
tools_required: Chemical dosing pump | Circulation pump | pH meter | Temperature probe | Effluent treatment system

summary: Internal inspection procedure for FGD absorber tower during shutdown
key_steps: 1. Isolate and drain absorber 2. Ventilate for 24 hours 3. Atmosphere testing before entry 4. Inspect rubber lining condition 5. Check spray headers and nozzles 6. Inspect mist eliminator blades 7. Measure wall thickness at critical points 8. Document with photographs
safety_precautions: Confined space entry — full procedure. Wet slippery surfaces — non-slip footwear. Chemical residue hazard — full PPE.
tools_required: 4-gas detector | Inspection camera | UT thickness gauge | Scaffolding | PPE kit | Lighting

summary: Maintenance of vacuum system including pumps ejectors and condensers
key_steps: 1. Isolate vacuum system 2. Check vacuum pump mechanical seals 3. Inspect ejector nozzle for erosion 4. Clean condenser tubes 5. Check vacuum line for leaks 6. Rebuild pump if required 7. Verify vacuum hold test 8. Restart and monitor
safety_precautions: Ensure system is at atmospheric pressure before opening. Chemical residue in condenser — wear PPE.
tools_required: Vacuum gauge | Seal replacement kit | Nozzle inspection tools | Tube cleaning tools

summary: Procedure for maintaining boiler feed and drum water chemistry within limits
key_steps: 1. Sample feedwater — check pH conductivity O2 hardness 2. Sample drum water — pH TDS phosphate silica 3. Compare with ASME/IBR limits 4. Adjust chemical dosing 5. Manage blowdown rate 6. Monitor condensate quality 7. Record all parameters 8. Report excursions
safety_precautions: Chemical handling PPE mandatory. Coordinate with water treatment operator. Report any chemistry excursion immediately.
tools_required: Water testing kit | pH meter | Conductivity meter | Dosing pumps | Sample cooler

summary: Procedure for safe energization and de-energization of ESP electrical fields
key_steps: 1. Verify all personnel clear of ESP 2. Close access doors and verify interlocks 3. Energize fields one by one starting from outlet 4. Monitor secondary voltage and current 5. Adjust AVC parameters 6. For de-energization — reverse order 7. Ground all fields 8. Wait 10 minutes before access
safety_precautions: Lethal voltages present — ONLY authorized personnel. Verify grounding sticks applied. Never bypass safety interlocks.
tools_required: Voltage tester | Ground sticks | Interlock test kit | AVC programmer

summary: Procedure for isolating individual bag filter compartments for online maintenance
key_steps: 1. Close outlet damper of target compartment 2. Close inlet damper 3. Allow residual gas to exhaust via pulse 4. Verify zero flow through compartment 5. Perform maintenance 6. Reverse damper sequence for return 7. Monitor DP after return 8. Verify opacity stable
safety_precautions: Verify zero gas flow before entry. Dust explosion risk — no ignition sources. Hot surfaces possible.
tools_required: DP gauge | Damper position indicators | Dust mask | Inspection light

summary: Emergency response procedure for equipment fire at customer site
key_steps: 1. Sound fire alarm 2. Evacuate area — headcount 3. Call fire services 4. Isolate fuel and electrical supply 5. Use appropriate extinguisher if safe 6. Brief fire team on equipment type 7. Post-fire inspection 8. Incident investigation
safety_precautions: Personnel safety first — do not attempt to fight fire if risk is high. Know fire extinguisher types for equipment. Assembly point awareness.
tools_required: Fire extinguishers | Emergency stop buttons | Communication radio | First aid kit
